expectations.evidence: Goes straight to Phase A session opening without asking for clarification — correctly reads 'IMS tickets' and 'workshop transcripts' as Phase A signals
Full four-phase table (Phase 0 through Phase 3) with focus and output file names
Explicitly states: 'IMS ticket dump will give us quantitative findings; the transcripts will provide directional signals that we will clearly label throughout'
Response follows the structured session opening protocol — no generic tips, no two-week plan, no best-practice lists
